-- FNV-1a 32-bit hash
function fnv1a_32(str)
    local hash = 0x811c9dc5
    for i = 1, #str do
        hash = bit32.bxor(hash, string.byte(str, i))
        hash = bit32.band(hash * 0x01000193, 0xFFFFFFFF)
    end
    return hash
end

-- Make a clean “reduced” slug: lowercase, dashes for spaces, strip punctuation (incl. '/').
local function toReducedSlug(name)
  local s = (name or ""):lower()
  s = s:gsub("%s+", "-")         -- spaces -> dash
  s = s:gsub("[^%w%-]", "")      -- strip everything that's not [a-z0-9-]
  s = s:gsub("%-+", "-")         -- collapse repeats
  return s
end

function sendAnalytics(eventName, player, extra)
  if version=="dev" then return end
  local sid = player and player.steam_id or ""
  -- anonymize the player's steam id
  local anonID = sid ~= "" and fnv1a_32("cruxisfine" .. sid) or 0
  local payload = {
    mod       = "Grand Archive : Fracturized",
    version   = version,
    event     = eventName,
    timestamp = os.time(),
    session   = analyticsSessionID,
    player    = anonID,
    extra     = extra or {},
  }
  local body    = JSON.encode(payload)
  local headers = { ["Content-Type"] = "application/json" }

  WebRequest.custom(
    analyticsURL,      -- url
    "POST",            -- method
    true,              -- download response body
    body,              -- data to send
    headers,           -- headers
    function(req)      -- callback
      if req.is_error or req.response_code >= 400 then
        print(string.format(
          "Analytics ➜ ERROR %s: %s",
          tostring(req.response_code),
          req.error or req.text
        ))
      end
    end
  )
end

function onLoad()
  analyticsSessionID = os.time()
  sendAnalytics("load", Player["White"], nil)
  print("Type 'index cardname' to spawn a card with that name.")
end

function toggleAnalytics(player,value,index)
  enableAnalytics = not enableAnalytics
  print("Analytics collected? - " .. tostring(enableAnalytics))
end

function onPlayerConect(player_id)
  player_id.promote()
end

function onPlayerDisconnect(player_id)
  sendAnalytics("disconnect", player_id, nil)
end

function getSnapPosition (mat, position)
  basic_position = deck_position[position]
  scale = mat.getScale()
  scaleFactor = scale.z / scale.x

  return {basic_position[1] * scaleFactor, basic_position[2], basic_position[3]}
end

card_rotations = {
  up = {0,0,0},
  right = {0,90,0},
  down = {0,180,0},
  left = {0,270,0}
}

function setMatSnapPoints(mat, scaleFactor)
  local inverseScale = 1 / (scaleFactor or 1)
  local snap_points = {
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "material"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "banished"),
      rotation = card_rotations["left"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "main"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    },
    {
      position = getSnapPosition(mat, "graveyard"),
      rotation = card_rotations["up"],
      rotation_snap = true
    }
  }

  local memory_start = -0.975 * inverseScale
  local memory_offset = 0.150 * inverseScale
  local memory_count = 14

  for memory_index = 0, memory_count - 1 do
    local memory_snap_point = {
      position = {
        memory_start + (memory_index * memory_offset),
        0,
        memory_row_z
      },
      rotation = {0, 0, 0},
      rotation_snap = true
    }
    table.insert(snap_points, memory_snap_point)
  end

  mat.setSnapPoints(snap_points)
  mat.interactable = false
end

function glimpseQuickAction(player, value, index)
  glimpse1(player.color)
end

function glimpse1(playerColor)

  local deck = findPlayerDeckByName(playerColor, "main")
  if not deck then return end

  -- 1) Take the top card (index=0) off the deck,
  --    dropping it just above the deck so it spawns in view
  local spawnPos = deck.getPosition() + Vector(0, 2, 0)
  local card = deck.takeObject({
    index    = 0,
    position = spawnPos,
    smooth   = false
  })

  if card then
    Wait.condition(function()
      -- send it to the player’s hand (hand #2 here),
      -- then register it with the Encoder
      card.deal(1, playerColor, 2)
      Encoder.call("APIencodeObject", { obj = card })
      Encoder.call("APIobjEnableProp", { obj = card, propID = "πGlimpse" })

    end, function()
      return not card.spawning
    end)
  end
end

function isFourPlayerMode()
    local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
    if not redMat then return true end
    local posX = redMat.getPosition().x
    return posX < -10
end

function isStillSwitching()
  local redMat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats.Red)
  if not redMat then return true end
  return redMat.isSmoothMoving()
end

function toggleBigMat(player, value, index)
    local mat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    if not mat then return end

    local handzone = getObjectFromGUID(playerhandzones[player.color])
    if not handzone then return end

    local currentScale = mat.getScale().x
    local newScale = 22 - currentScale
    mat.setScale({newScale, 1, newScale})

    local pos = handzone.getPosition()
    pos.z = (pos.z > 0) and 57-pos.z or -57-pos.z
    handzone.setPosition(pos)
end

function togglePlayerCount()

    if isStillSwitching() then
      print ("Wait for switching to finish first!")
      return
    end


    local moveDistance = -20
    local hideDistance = -200
    shouldLock = false

    if isFourPlayerMode() then
      moveDistance = 20
      hideDistance = 200
      shouldLock = true
    end

    print("[INFO] Switching between 2p/4p mode")

    moveObjectX(playmats.Red,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmats.Blue,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(lifecounterslarge.Red,   moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounterslarge.Blue,  moveDistance)

    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerglimpsezones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerglimpsezones.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Blue, moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Red,  moveDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Blue, moveDistance)

    for _, bagGUID in pairs(bags) do
        --moveObjectX(bagGUID, moveDistance)
    end

    moveObjectX(playmats.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playmats.Purple, hideDistance)


    setObjectLock(lifecounterslarge.Green, shouldLock)
    setObjectLock(lifecounterslarge.Purple, shouldLock)


    moveObjectX(lifecounterslarge.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(lifecounterslarge.Purple, hideDistance)

    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerhandzones.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerglimpsezones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerglimpsezones.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playerfields.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermemoryzones.Purple, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Green, hideDistance)
    moveObjectX(playermaterialdeckzones.Purple, hideDistance)
end

function moveObjectX(guid, deltaX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = pos.x + deltaX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos)
end

function moveObjectToX(guid, targetX)
    local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not obj then return end

    local pos = obj.getPosition()
    pos.x = targetX
    obj.setPositionSmooth(pos)
end

function setObjectLock(guid, locked)
  local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
  obj.setLock(locked)
end

function doneSideboarding(player, value, button_id)
  toggleVisibility(player, button_id)
end

function toggleVisibility(player, id)
  visibility = Global.UI.getAttribute(id, "visibility")
  visible = visibility:find(player.color) ~= nil
  if visible then
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "visibility", visibility:gsub("|" .. player.color, ""))
  else
    Global.UI.setAttribute(id, "visibility", visibility .. "|" .. player.color)
  end
end

target_playmat_width = 35.6

function setPlaymatImage(player, imageUrl)
    local player_color = player.color
    local guid = playmats[player_color]
    local originalObj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
    if not originalObj then
        print("No playmat found for color: " .. player_color)
        return
    end

    if imageUrl=="" then
      return
    end

    -- Update the image
    local custom = originalObj.getCustomObject()
    custom.image = imageUrl
    originalObj.setCustomObject(custom)
    originalObj.reload()

    -- Wait a bit for reload, then re-fetch by GUID
    Wait.time(function()

            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if not obj then
                print("Waiting for object to reload...")
                return false  -- Try again
            end

            local bounds = obj.getBounds().size
            local actualWidth = bounds.x
            if actualWidth == 0 then
                print("Bounds not ready yet...")
                return false  -- Try again
            end

            -- Rescale X to match target width
            local currentScale = obj.getScale()
            local scaleFactor = target_playmat_width / actualWidth
            obj.setScale({
                x = currentScale.x * scaleFactor,
                y = currentScale.y,
                z = currentScale.z
            })

            setMatSnapPoints(obj, scaleFactor)
            return true  -- Done
    end, 0.5)
end

function getCard(custom_card, name, index)
  card_index = index + 100
  return {
    Name = "CardCustom",
    Transform = {
      scaleX = card_scale,
      scaleY = 1,
      scaleZ = card_scale
    },
    Nickname = name,
    CardID = card_index * 100,
    CustomDeck = {
      [card_index] = custom_card
    }
  }
end

local function trimSpaces(str)
    if str == nil then
      return ""
    end
    return str:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
end

local function to_slug(s)
  if not s or s == "" then return "" end
  s = trimSpaces(s:lower())
  s = s:gsub("%s+", "-")
  s = s:gsub("[',]", "")
  s = s:gsub("[^%w%-]+", "-")
  s = s:gsub("%-+", "-")
  s = s:gsub("^%-+", ""):gsub("%-+$", "")
  return s
end

local function randomGUID()
    local chars = '0123456789abcdef'
    local res = {}
    for i=1,6 do
        local rand = math.random(#chars)
        res[#res+1] = chars:sub(rand, rand)
    end
    return table.concat(res)
end

extraDecks = {
    references = {},
    token = {},
    generated = {},
    mastery = {}
}
shouldSpawnExtraDecks=false

function spawnDeck(name, cards, player, as_bag)
    if name == "references" or name == "token" or name == "generated" or name == "mastery" then
        for _, card in ipairs(cards) do
            table.insert(extraDecks[name], card)
            shouldSpawnExtraDecks=true
        end
        return -- Delay spawning until all are gathered
    end

    if name == "extra" then
        local combined = {}
        for _, group in pairs(extraDecks) do
            for _, card in ipairs(group) do
                table.insert(combined, card)
            end
        end
        cards = combined
    end

    local playmatGUID = playmats[player.color]
    if(playmatGUID==nil) then
      playmatGUID = playmats["Red"]
    end
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmatGUID)
    local rotation = playmat.getRotation()
    local position = playmat.positionToWorld(getSnapPosition(playmat, name))
    local bounds = playmat.getBounds()

    local deck = getDeck(name, cards, player)
    if as_bag or name == "extra" then
        deck = getDeckBag(name, deck, player)
    end

    deck.Transform = deck.Transform or {}
    deck.Transform.posX = position.x
    deck.Transform.posY = playmat.getPosition().y + bounds.size.y + bounds.offset.y + 1
    deck.Transform.posZ = position.z
    deck.Transform.rotY = rotation.y

    return spawnObjectData({data = deck})
end

function tableContains(table, value)
  for i = 1,#table do
    if (table[i]:lower() == value) then
      return true
    end
  end
  return false
end

function getDeck(name, cards, player)
    global_offset = (global_offset % 30) + 1

    local main_sleeves = getSleeves(player)
    local material_sleeves = getMaterialDeckSleeves(player)
    local sleeve = material_sleeves
    if name == "main" then
      sleeve = main_sleeves
    end


    local deckOffset = global_offset * 1000

    local deck_ids       = {}
    local custom_deck    = {}
    local contained_objs = {}

    local idx = 1
    for _, card in ipairs(cards) do
        local cardstomake = (card.quantity == 0 and 1) or (card.quantity or 1)

        for i = 1, cardstomake do
            local orientation = (card.orientation or ""):lower()
            local frontSide, backSide = nil, nil
            local hasOrientations = (type(card.orientations) == "table" and #card.orientations > 0)
            local isMultiState = false

            if hasOrientations then
                isMultiState = true
                local oppositeNeeded = (orientation == "front") and "back"
                    or (orientation == "back") and "front"
                    or nil

                if oppositeNeeded then
                    for b, alt in ipairs(card.orientations) do
                        if (alt.orientation==nil) or (type(alt.orientation) == "string"
                          and alt.orientation:lower() == oppositeNeeded) then
                            backSide = alt
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end

            local hasTypes = (type(card.types) == "table" and #(card.types) > 0)
            if hasTypes then
              if tableContains(card.types, "regalia") or tableContains(card.types, "champion") then
                sleeve = material_sleeves
              else
                sleeve = main_sleeves
              end
            end

            if orientation == "front" and backSide then
                frontSide = card

            elseif orientation == "back" and backSide then
                -- the user put the back side in their deck so we'll just flip it for them
                frontSide = backSide
                backSide  = card
            end

            if isMultiState then
                local frontKey    = (deckOffset + idx)
                local backKey     = frontKey + 1
                local frontBackKey= backKey + 1
                local frontID     = frontKey * 100
                local backID      = backKey * 100
                local frontBackID = frontBackKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, frontID)


                local frontURL = frontSide.image or sleeve
                local backURL  = backSide.image  or sleeve

                -- This section is to work around a bug in TTS
                local altBackURL

                if backURL:find("shoutatyourdecks.com/images/") then
                    altBackURL = backURL:gsub("https://[^/]+/images/", "https://api.gatcg.com/cards/images/")
                elseif backURL:find("api.gatcg.com/cards/images/") then
                    altBackURL = backURL:gsub("https://api.gatcg.com/cards/images/", "https://shoutatyourdecks.com/images/")
                else
                    altBackURL = backURL
                end

                custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL .. "?format="..playformat,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }
                custom_deck[tostring(backKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = altBackURL,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }
                custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = frontURL,
                    BackURL      = backURL,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = false,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    Nickname = frontSide.name or "(NoName)",
                    CardID   = frontID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(frontKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontKey)]
                    },
                    States = {
                        ["2"] = {
                            GUID = randomGUID(),
                            Name = "CardCustom",
                            Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                            Nickname = backSide.name or "(NoName)",
                            CardID   = backID,
                            HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                            CustomDeck = {
                                [tostring(backKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(backKey)]
                            }
                        },
                        ["3"] = {
                            GUID = randomGUID(),
                            Name = "CardCustom",
                            Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                            Nickname = frontSide.name .. " / " .. backSide.name or "(NoName)",
                            CardID   = frontBackID,
                            HideWhenFaceDown = false,
                            CustomDeck = {
                                [tostring(frontBackKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(frontBackKey)]
                            }
                        }
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 3
            else
                local singleKey = deckOffset + idx
                local singleID  = singleKey * 100

                table.insert(deck_ids, singleID)

                local faceUrl = card.image or sleeve

                custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)] = {
                    FaceURL      = faceUrl .. "?format="..playformat,
                    BackURL      = sleeve,
                    NumWidth     = 1,
                    NumHeight    = 1,
                    BackIsHidden = true,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    UniqueBack   = false,
                    Type         = 0
                }

                table.insert(contained_objs, {
                    GUID = randomGUID(),
                    Name = "CardCustom",
                    Transform = { scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale },
                    Nickname = card.name,
                    CardID   = singleID,
                    HideWhenFaceDown = true,
                    CustomDeck = {
                        [tostring(singleKey)] = custom_deck[tostring(singleKey)]
                    }
                })
                idx = idx + 1
            end
        end
    end

    if #contained_objs == 1 then
        contained_objs[1].Transform.rotZ = 180
        return contained_objs[1]
    else
        return {
            GUID = randomGUID(),
            Name = "Deck",
            Transform = {
                rotX = 360, rotY = 180, rotZ = 180,
                scaleX = card_scale, scaleY = 1, scaleZ = card_scale
            },
            Nickname = name,
            DeckIDs = deck_ids,
            CustomDeck = custom_deck,
            ContainedObjects = contained_objs
        }
    end
end

function importDeck(player, value, index)
    local deck_text = ui_decklist_state[player.color]
    deck_text = trimSpaces(deck_text)

    if deck_text == "" then
        broadcastToColor("No Decklist URL provided!", player.color, {255,0,0})
        return
    end

    if deck_text:match("^{") then
      local json = JSON.decode(deck_text)
      if json then
          if json.error == nil then
              SpawnDeckFromJson(json, player, value, index)
              shouldAutoSnapshotBoardStateForPlayer[player.color] = true
              return
          end
      end
    end

    if importDeckFromURL(deck_text, player, value, index) then
        return
    end    -- deck_text:match("^https?://")

    broadcastToColor("Invalid deck input! Provide a valid JSON decklist or a URL.", player.color, {255,0,0})
end

function importDeckFromURL(deck_url, player, value, index)

  if deck_url ~= nil and deck_url:len() > 0 then
    if deck_url:sub(1, 5) ~= "https" then
      deck_url = "https://" .. deck_url
    end

    -- Silvie
    if deck_url:find("silvie.org") ~= nil or deck_url:find("silv.ie") then
        if deck_url:find("format=json") == nil then
            if deck_url:find("?") == nil then
              deck_url = deck_url .. "?format=json"
            else
              deck_url = deck_url .. "&format=json"
            end
        end
        sendAnalytics("importDeck", player, { site = "silvie.org" })
    elseif deck_url:find("shoutatyourdecks.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("/decks/", "/api/")
        sendAnalytics("importDeck", player, { site = "shoutatyourdecks.com" })
    elseif deck_url:find("silvie.gg") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("silvie.gg/decklist%?deck=", "build.silvie.gg/deck/")
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("silvie.gg/decklist/", "build.silvie.gg/deck/")
        sendAnalytics("importDeck", player, { site = "silvie.gg" })
    elseif deck_url:find("jsonblob.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("jsonblob.com/", "jsonblob.com/api/jsonBlob/")
        sendAnalytics("importDeck", player, { site = "jsonblob.com" })
    elseif deck_url:find("tcgarchitect.com") ~= nil then
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("tcgarchitect.com/grand%-archive/decks/", "api.tcgarchitect.com/tts/grand-archive/deck/")
        deck_url = deck_url:gsub("tcgarchitect.com/grand%-archive/tournaments/decklists/", "api.tcgarchitect.com/tts/grand-archive/tournament-deck/")
        sendAnalytics("importDeck", player, { site = "tcgarchitect.com" })
    elseif deck_url:find("fractalofin.site") ~= nil then
        local event_id, player_id,suffix
        local patterns = {
            { pattern = "/player/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)", swap = true, suffix=""  }, -- player page
            { pattern = "#deck_(%d+)_(%d+)",             swap = false, suffix="" }, -- card/archetype page
            { pattern = "/%w+/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)_topcut",    swap = false, suffix="_topcut" },  -- event page
            { pattern = "/%w+/(%d+).html#deck_(%d+)",    swap = false, suffix="" },  -- event page
        }

        for _, entry in ipairs(patterns) do
            local first, second = deck_url:match(entry.pattern)
            if first and second then
                player_id = entry.swap and tonumber(first) or tonumber(second)
                event_id = entry.swap and tonumber(second) or tonumber(first)
                suffix = entry.suffix
                break
            end
        end

        if event_id and player_id then
            deck_url = "https://fractalofin.site/tts/event_" .. event_id .. "/" .. player_id .. suffix .. ".json"
        else
            broadcastToColor("Invalid Fractalofin URL format!", player.color, {255,0,0})
            return
        end
        sendAnalytics("importDeck", player, { site = "fractalofin.site" })
    else
        broadcastToColor("Invalid Decklist URL!", player.color, {255,0,0})
        return false
    end

    WebRequest.get(deck_url, function(req)
      if req.is_error then
        log(req.error)
      else
        json = JSON.decode(req.text)
        if json.error ~= nil then
          log(json.error)
          if json.error == "silvie/bad-request" then
            broadcastToColor("Invalid Silvie.org Decklist!", player.color, {255,0,0})
          else
            broadcastToColor("Unknown Error :(", player.color, {255,0,0})
          end
          return false
        else
          -- Generate Cards
          for deck, cards in pairs(json.cards) do
            if #cards > 0 then
              local obj = spawnDeck(deck, cards, player, index=="import_deck_bag")
              -- temporarily disabled
              if obj and deck:lower() == "main" then
                local markerGUID = notshuffledmarkers[player.color]
                local marker = getObjectFromGUID(markerGUID)
                if marker then
                  local playmatGUID = playmats[player.color]
                  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmatGUID)

                  if playmat then
                    local rot = playmat.getRotation()
                    marker.setRotation(rot)
                    if(rot.y>90) then
                      marker.setPosition(obj.getPosition() + Vector(6, 0, 0))
                    else
                      marker.setPosition(obj.getPosition() + Vector(-6, 0, 0))
                    end
                  end

                  marker.setName("Not Shuffled Marker")
                  marker.setVar("ownerColor", player.color)
                end
              end
            end
          end
          if shouldSpawnExtraDecks then
            spawnDeck("extra", {}, player, true)
          end
          extraDecks = {
              references = {},
              token = {},
              generated = {},
              mastery = {}
          }
          shouldSpawnExtraDecks=false
          local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player.color, "main")
          deckcounts[player.color][2] = math.max(60, #mainDeck.getObjects())
          deleteBoardedCopies(player.color)
          createBoardedCopies(player.color)
          toggleImportLayout(player)
        end
      end
    end)
    return true
  end
end



function spawnDeckRemote(payload)
    deck = SpawnDeckFromJson(payload.json, payload.player, 0, 0)
    if (payload.locationOverride) then deck.setPosition(payload.locationOverride) end
    if (payload.rotationOverride) then deck.setRotation(payload.rotationOverride) end
end

function SpawnDeckFromJson(json, player, value, index)
  for deck, cards in pairs(json.cards) do
    if #cards > 0 then
      return spawnDeck(deck, cards, player, index=="import_deck_bag")
    end
  end
end


cameraPositions2P = {
    Red    = { position = Vector(0, -2.5, -1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 0, z = 0} },
    Blue   = { position = Vector(0, -2.5, 1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 180, z = 0} },
}

cameraPositions4P = {
    Red    = { position = Vector(-20, -2.5, -1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 0, z = 0} },
    Blue   = { position = Vector(-20, -2.5, 1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 180, z = 0} },
    Green  = { position = Vector(20, -2.5, -1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 0, z = 0} },
    Purple = { position = Vector(20, -2.5, 1), rotation = {x = 45, y = 180, z = 0} }
}

function resetCamera(player, value, index)
    local player_color = player.color
    cameraPositions = cameraPositions2P
    if isFourPlayerMode() then
      cameraPositions = cameraPositions4P
    end

    local camData = cameraPositions[player_color]
    if camData then
        local player = nil
        for _, p in pairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
            if p.color == player_color then
                player = p
                break
            end
        end
        if not player then
            return
        end

        player.lookAt({
            position = camData.position,
            pitch = camData.rotation.x,
            yaw = camData.rotation.y,
            roll = camData.rotation.z
        })
    end
end

-- ================= BANISH QUEUE + REORGANIZE =================

banishQueue   = banishQueue   or {}
isBanishBusy  = isBanishBusy  or false

local function getMemoryZone(color)
  return getObjectFromGUID(playermemoryzones[color])
end

local function getPlaymat(color)
  return getObjectFromGUID(playmats[color])
end

local function getMemoryCards(zone)
  local t = {}
  for _, o in ipairs(zone.getObjects() or {}) do
    if o.tag == "Card" then table.insert(t, o) end
  end
  return t
end

local function zoneHasDecks(zone)
  for _, o in ipairs(zone.getObjects() or {}) do
    if o.tag == "Deck" then return true end
  end
  return false
end

local function objectIsInZone(obj, zone)
  for _, o in ipairs(zone.getObjects() or {}) do
    if o == obj then return true end
  end
  return false
end

-- Wait until: (a) no Decks remain in the zone and (b) all cards are not smooth-moving
local function waitMemoryCalm(zone, cb)
  Wait.condition(cb, function()
    if zoneHasDecks(zone) then return false end
    for _, c in ipairs(getMemoryCards(zone)) do
      if c.isSmoothMoving() then return false end
    end
    return true
  end)
end

-- Only reorganize when there WERE stacks
local function reorganizeMemoryZoneOnly(color, done)
  local zone = getMemoryZone(color)
  if not zone then if done then done() end return end

  local hadDecks = zoneHasDecks(zone)
  if not hadDecks then
    if done then done() end
    return
  end

  splitDecksInZone(zone)

  -- brief delay for spawned singles, then lay out evenly and wait until calm
  Wait.time(function()
    local memPos      = zone.getPosition()
    local memoryCards = getMemoryCards(zone)
    reorganizeMemoryForTotal(memoryCards, memPos, #memoryCards)

    waitMemoryCalm(zone, function()
      if done then done() end
    end)
  end, 0.2)
end


function performBanishRoulette(cardsInMemory, targetCard, onDone)
  local cfg = banishAnim or {
    enabled     = true,
    totalTime   = 0.6,
    flashTime   = 0.12,
    perStepMin  = 0.04,
    perStepMax  = 0.12,
    maxCards    = 30,
    colorAll    = {1.0, 0.9, 0.2},  -- yellow
    colorOut    = {1.0, 0.35, 0.35},-- red
    colorTarget = {0.35, 1.0, 0.55} -- green
  }

  if not cfg.enabled or #cardsInMemory <= 1 or #cardsInMemory > cfg.maxCards then
    if onDone then onDone() end
    return
  end

  -- Build elimination order (all non-targets, shuffled)
  local pool = {}
  for _, c in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do if c ~= targetCard then table.insert(pool, c) end end
  for i = #pool, 2, -1 do local j = math.random(i); pool[i], pool[j] = pool[j], pool[i] end

  local flashT  = cfg.flashTime or 0.12
  local steps   = #pool
  local budget  = math.max(0, (cfg.totalTime or 0.6) - flashT)
  local perStep = (steps > 0) and (budget / steps) or 0
  perStep       = math.max(cfg.perStepMin or 0.04, math.min(cfg.perStepMax or 0.12, perStep))
  local keepAll = flashT + steps * perStep + 0.25  -- keep yellow long enough to cover eliminations

  -- Stage A: keep EVERYONE yellow for the whole sequence
  for _, c in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
    if c and not c.isDestroyed() then c.highlightOn(cfg.colorAll, keepAll) end
  end

  -- Stage B: elimination — flash red then turn OFF each non-target
  Wait.time(function()
    for idx, c in ipairs(pool) do
      Wait.time(function()
        if c and not c.isDestroyed() then
          local pulse = math.max(0.06, perStep * 0.6)
          c.highlightOn(cfg.colorOut, pulse)
          Wait.time(function()
            if c and not c.isDestroyed() then c.highlightOff() end
          end, pulse)
        end
      end, (idx - 1) * perStep)
    end

    -- Stage C: crown the target, then finish
    Wait.time(function()
      if targetCard and not targetCard.isDestroyed() then
        -- If target was kept yellow, overwrite with a short green crown
        targetCard.highlightOn(cfg.colorTarget, 0.8)
      end
      if onDone then onDone() end
    end, steps * perStep + 0.02)

  end, flashT)
end


-- Actually move the selected card to banish
local function banishCardToZone(color, card)
  local mat = getPlaymat(color)
  if not (mat and card) then return end
  local banishPos = mat.positionToWorld(deck_position["banished"])
  card.setPositionSmooth(banishPos)
  card.setRotationSmooth(card_rotations["left"])
end

-- Process a single queued banish request
local function processNextBanish()
  if isBanishBusy then return end
  if #banishQueue == 0 then return end

  -- lock first to avoid races from multiple callers
  isBanishBusy = true
  local job = table.remove(banishQueue, 1)
  if not job then isBanishBusy = false; return end

  local color = job.color
  local zone  = getMemoryZone(color)
  if not zone then isBanishBusy = false; processNextBanish(); return end

  -- if there are stacks, split & re-layout; otherwise skip straight to pick
  local function afterReady()
    local cards = getMemoryCards(zone)
    if #cards == 0 then
      isBanishBusy = false
      processNextBanish()
      return
    end
    local target = cards[math.random(#cards)]
    performBanishRoulette(cards, target, function()
      banishCardToZone(color, target)
      isBanishBusy = false
      processNextBanish()
    end)
  end

  if zoneHasDecks(zone) then
    reorganizeMemoryZoneOnly(color, afterReady)
  else
    -- no decks; optionally ensure nothing is still moving
    Wait.condition(afterReady, function()
      for _, c in ipairs(getMemoryCards(zone)) do
        if c.isSmoothMoving() then return false end
      end
      return true
    end)
  end
end

-- Call this instead of the old banishOneMemoryCard body
function banishOneMemoryCard(player, value, index)
  table.insert(banishQueue, { color = player.color })
  processNextBanish()
end


function clearPlaymat(player, value, index)
    clearFieldAndHand(player, value, index)
    clearSideboardAndExtra(player, value, index)
    deleteBoardedCopies(player.color)
end

function findPlayerZoneByNameRemote(packet)
  return findPlayerZoneByName(packet[1], packet[2])
end

function findPlayerZoneByName(player_color, name_fragment)
  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
  if not playmat then return end

  local snap_offset = getSnapPosition(playmat, name_fragment:lower())

  if not snap_offset then return nil end  -- unknown type

  local targetPos = playmat.positionToWorld(snap_offset)

  return targetPos
end

function findPlayerDeckByNameRemote(packet)
  return findPlayerDeckByName(packet[1], packet[2])
end

function findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, name_fragment)
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
    if not playmat then return end

    local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds(player_color)

    -- Try first by name matching
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        local pos = obj.getPosition()
        if obj.tag == "Deck"
        and obj.getName():lower():find(name_fragment:lower())
        and isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
            return obj
        end
    end

    -- If no deck with matching name, fallback to position check

    local snap_offset = getSnapPosition(playmat, name_fragment:lower())
    if not snap_offset then return nil end  -- unknown type

    local targetPos = playmat.positionToWorld(snap_offset)

    -- Find closest deck to the expected snap point
    local bestDeck = nil
    local bestDist = 1 -- usually like 0.3ish

    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local dist = (obj.getPosition() - targetPos):magnitude()
            if dist < bestDist then
                bestDeck = obj
                bestDist = dist
            end
        end
    end

    return bestDeck
end

local function getVisibleDeckEntry(deck)
  local list = deck.getObjects() or {}
  if #list == 0 then return nil end

  local pick, maxIndex = list[1], (list[1].index or -1)
  for _, e in ipairs(list) do
    local idx = e.index or -1
    if idx > maxIndex then
      pick, maxIndex = e, idx
    end
  end
  return pick or list[#list]
end


function onObjectRandomize(object, player_color)
    if object.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

    local markerGUID = notshuffledmarkers[player_color]
    local marker = getObjectFromGUID(markerGUID)
    local markerPos = marker.getPosition()
    if not marker then return end

    if (marker.getPosition().x>-100) then
      marker.setPosition(marker.getPosition() + Vector(-200, 0, 0))
    end

    local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
    if object == mainDeck then
      sideboardingSnapshotForContainer(object)
    end
end

function onObjectLeaveContainer(container, leavingObject)
    local cardName      = (leavingObject.getName() or ""):lower()
    local containerName = (container.getName()     or ""):lower()

    if cardName:find("spirit of") and containerName:find("material") then
      for _, color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
        matDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(color, "material")
        if matDeck == container then
          sendAnalytics("playedSpirit", Player[color])
        end
      end
    end

    if container ~= nil and container.tag == "Deck" then
      sideboardingSnapshotForContainer(container)
      local isFaceUp = container.getRotation().z<90
      if isFaceUp then
        local visibledeckentry = getVisibleDeckEntry(container)
        if visibledeckentry ~= nil then
          local slugoverride = toReducedSlug(visibledeckentry.name)
          inscriptCardRulesText(container, slugoverride)
        end
      end
    end
end

function onObjectEnterContainer(container, enteringObject)
   if (container.tag == "Deck") then
      sideboardingSnapshotForContainer(container)
      local isFaceUp = container.getRotation().z<90
      if isFaceUp then
        local slugoverride = toReducedSlug(getVisibleDeckEntry(container).name)
        inscriptCardRulesText(container, slugoverride)
      end
   end
end

shouldAutoSnapshotBoardStateForPlayer = {
  Red = true,
  Blue = true,
  Green = true,
  Purple = true
}

function trySideboardSnapshotForPlayer(player, value, id)
    local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player.color, "main")
    local matDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player.color, "material")

      if mainDeck and matDeck then
          local mainSize = mainDeck and #mainDeck.getObjects() or 0
          local matSize = matDeck and #matDeck.getObjects() or 0

          deleteBoardedCopies(player.color)
          createBoardedCopies(player.color)
          broadcastToColor("Snapshotted Main and Material deck. Press GG Go Next to recall them.", player.color, Table)
          shouldAutoSnapshotBoardStateForPlayer[player.color] = false
          return true
      else
        broadcastToColor("Couldn't find decks to snapshot.", player.color, Table)
      end

    return false
end

function sideboardingSnapshotForContainer(container)
    if not container or container.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

    for _, color in ipairs({"Red", "Blue", "Green", "Purple"}) do
        if shouldAutoSnapshotBoardStateForPlayer[color] then
          local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(color, "main")
          local matDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(color, "material")

          if container == mainDeck or container == matDeck then
              local mainSize = mainDeck and #mainDeck.getObjects() or 0
              local matSize = matDeck and #matDeck.getObjects() or 0

              if mainSize >= deckcounts[color][2] and matSize == deckcounts[color][1] then
                  deleteBoardedCopies(color)
                  createBoardedCopies(color)
                  log("Updating Sideboard state for player ".. color)
              end

              break
          end
        end
    end
end

function createBoardedCopies(player_color)
    local marker = getObjectFromGUID(notshuffledmarkers[player_color])
    if not marker then return end
    local markerPos = marker.getPosition()

    local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
    if mainDeck then
        local mainClone = mainDeck.clone({
            position = markerPos + Vector(-200, 2, 0),
            snap_to_grid = false
        })
        mainClone.setName("Saved Copy: ".. player_color .." Main")
        mainClone.setVar("ownerColor", player_color)
        mainClone.setLock(true)
    end

    local matDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "material")
    if matDeck then
        --deckcounts[player_color][1] = #matDeck.getObjects()
        local matClone = matDeck.clone({
            position = markerPos + Vector(-204, 2, 0),
            snap_to_grid = false
        })
        matClone.setName("Saved Copy: ".. player_color .." Material")
        matClone.setVar("ownerColor", player_color)
        matClone.setLock(true)
    end
end

function deleteBoardedCopies(player_color)
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        local name = obj.getName()
        if name == "Saved Copy: ".. player_color .." Main" or name == "Saved Copy: " .. player_color .. " Material" then
            obj.destruct()
        end
    end
end

lastResetTimes = {
  Red = 0,
  Blue = 0,
  Green = 0,
  Purple = 0
}

rebounceProtectionTime = 60

function resetToGameStart(player, value, index)

    local now = os.time()
    if lastResetTimes[player.color] and now - lastResetTimes[player.color] > rebounceProtectionTime then
      sendAnalytics("GG Go Next", player.color)
      lastResetTimes[player.color] = now
    end

    local player_color = player.color
    largelifecounter = getObjectFromGUID(lifecounterslarge[player_color])

    if(largelifecounter ~= nil) then
      largelifecounter.setValue(0)
    end

    clearFieldAndHand(player, value, index)

    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])

    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
          local name = nil
          if obj.getName() == "Saved Copy: ".. player_color .." Main" then
              name = "main"
          elseif obj.getName() == "Saved Copy: " .. player_color .. " Material" then
              name = "material"
          end
          if name then
            local position = playmat.positionToWorld(getSnapPosition(playmat, name))
            obj.setPosition(position)
            obj.setLock(false)
            obj.setName(name)
          end
    end

    createBoardedCopies(player_color)
    local mainDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
    performResetFlourish(player, mainDeck, card_back)
    local materialDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "material")
    performResetFlourish(player, materialDeck, card_back)
end

function performResetFlourish(player, deck, sleeve_url)
    if not deck or deck.tag ~= "Deck" then return end

    local count = #deck.getObjects()
    if count < 3 then return end

    local center = deck.getPosition()
    local radius = 5
    local fixedCount = 12
    local angleStep = (2 * math.pi) / fixedCount

    local total = math.min(count, 30)
    local cardsToAnimate = total - 2
    local animDuration = 0.5
    local delayPerCard = animDuration / cardsToAnimate

    for i = 1, cardsToAnimate do
        local angle = angleStep * i
        local offset = Vector(math.cos(angle) * radius, 2, math.sin(angle) * radius)
        local delay = (i - 1) * delayPerCard

        Wait.time(function()
            local ghost = spawnObject({
                type = "Card",
                position = center + offset,
                rotation = {0, 0, 180},
                scale = {0.95, 0.95, 0.95},
                sound = false

            })

            if ghost then
                ghost.setCustomObject({
                  face = sleeve_url,
                  back = sleeve_url
                })

                ghost.setLock(true)
                ghost.setName("Flourish")
                ghost.setDescription("")

                Wait.time(function()
                    ghost.setPositionSmooth(center + Vector(0, 2 + i * 0.1, 0), false, true)
                end, 0.2)

                Wait.time(function()
                    if ghost then ghost.destruct() end
                end, 1.0)
            end
        end, delay)
    end
end


function clearFieldAndHand(player, value, index)
  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
  if not playmat then return end

  local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds(player.color)
  destroyEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)

  -- destroy anything in *all* of their hand zones (hand 1 and hand 2)
  local p = Player[player.color]
  for handIdx = 1, p.getHandCount() do
    for _, obj in ipairs(p.getHandObjects(handIdx) or {}) do
      obj.destruct()
    end
  end
end

function getBoundsOfDeckZone (player_color, zoneName)
  local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
  local localPos = getSnapPosition(playmat, zoneName)

  if playmat and localPos then

      local worldPos = playmat.positionToWorld(localPos)

      local halfSizeX = 2.0
      local halfSizeY = 2.0
      local halfSizeZ = 2.0

      local minBound = Vector(worldPos.x - halfSizeX, worldPos.y - halfSizeY, worldPos.z - halfSizeZ)
      local maxBound = Vector(worldPos.x + halfSizeX, worldPos.y + halfSizeY, worldPos.z + halfSizeZ)

      return minBound, maxBound

  end
end

function clearSideboardAndExtra(player, value, index)
  local additional_zones_to_clear = {
    "sideboard", "extra"
  }
  for _, zoneName in ipairs(additional_zones_to_clear) do
      local minBound, maxBound = getBoundsOfDeckZone( player.color, zoneName )
      if minBound then
        destroyEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)
      end
  end
end

function destroyEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound)
  -- Iterate through all objects and delete only cards, dice, and tokens
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do

      local pos = obj.getPosition()
      local tag = obj.tag

      -- Check if the object is inside the playmat's area
      if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then
          -- Delete only specific object types
          if tag == "Card" or tag == "Dice" or tag == "Chip" or tag == "Infinite" or tag == "Token" or tag == "Deck" or tag == "GoPiece" then
              obj.destroy()
          end
      end
  end
end

function getPlaymatBounds(color)
  local mat    = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[color])
  local b, c   = mat.getBounds(), mat.getPosition()
  local hx, hy, hz = b.size.x/2, 50, b.size.z/2
  return Vector(c.x - hx, c.y - hy, c.z - hz), Vector(c.x + hx, c.y + hy, c.z + hz)
end

function wakeUpEverythingOnPlaymat(player, value, index)
    local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player.color])
    if not playmat then return end

    local minBound, maxBound = getPlaymatBounds (player.color)
    local minBoundBanish, maxBoundBanish = getBoundsOfDeckZone (player.color, "banished")

    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" or obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local pos = obj.getPosition()

            if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) and not isPointInBounds(pos, minBoundBanish, maxBoundBanish) then

                local rot = obj.getRotation()
                local isFaceDown = rot.z > 90 and rot.z < 270

                local newRot = {
                    x = playmat.getRotation().x,
                    y = playmat.getRotation().y,
                    z = isFaceDown and 180 or 0
                }

                obj.setRotationSmooth(newRot)
            end
        end
    end
end

function isPointInBounds(point, minBound, maxBound)

  return point.x >= minBound.x and point.x <= maxBound.x and
     point.y >= minBound.y and point.y <= maxBound.y and
     point.z >= minBound.z and point.z <= maxBound.z
end

function wakeUpEverythingInBounds(minBound, maxBound, relativeObject)

end

 end

 if memoryCards == 0 then
   log("No Face Down Cards in Memory")
 else

function millTopCard(player, value, index)
  local playerColor= player.color
  local deck = findPlayerDeckByName(playerColor, "main")
  if not deck then return end
  local gravPos = findPlayerZoneByName( playerColor, "graveyard" )
  local target  = {x=gravPos.x, y=3, z=gravPos.z}

  local spawnPos = deck.getPosition() + Vector(0, 2, 0)
  local card = deck.takeObject({
    index    = 0,
    position = spawnPos,
    smooth   = false
  })
  local cardPosition = card.getPosition()

  local midTarget  = {x=(gravPos.x+cardPosition.x)/2, y=6, z=(gravPos.z+cardPosition.z)/2}

  local cardRot = card.getRotation()
  cardRot.z = 0
  card.setRotationSmooth(cardRot,false,true)
  Wait.time(function() card.setPositionSmooth(midTarget,false,true) end, 0.2)
  Wait.time(function() card.setPositionSmooth(target,false,true) end, 0.5)

end

function reserveIntoMemory(player, value, index)
    local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
    local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)
    if not memoryZone then
        log("Memory Zone for player " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    local handGuid = playerhandzones[player.color]
    local handZone = getObjectFromGUID(handGuid)
    if not handZone then
        log("Hand Zone for player " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    -- Find how many cards are already in the memory zone
    local memPos = memoryZone.getPosition()
    local memObjects = memoryZone.getObjects()
    local existingCount = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(memObjects) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" then
            existingCount = existingCount + 1
        end
    end

    local spacing = -3.2
    local initial = 9.5
    local cardsToMove = {}

    if (memPos.z <0) then
      spacing = spacing * -1
      initial = initial * -1
    end


    local handObjects = handZone.getObjects()
    if handObjects then
        for _, item in ipairs(handObjects) do
            if item.tag == "Card" then
                local rot = item.getRotation()
                if math.abs(item.getRotation().z) > 90 then
                    table.insert(cardsToMove, item)
                end
            end
        end
    end

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsToMove) do
        local offset = existingCount + (i - 1)
        local pos = {
            x = memPos.x + initial + offset%7 * spacing,
            y = memPos.y + 2,
            z = memPos.z
        }
        local quickPos = {
          x = (card.getPosition().x+pos.x)/2,
          y = (card.getPosition().y+pos.y+40)/2,
          z = (card.getPosition().z+pos.z)/2
        }
        card.setPosition(quickPos)
        card.setPositionSmooth(pos)
    end
end

function reorganizeMemory(player, value, index)
    local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
    local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)
    if not memoryZone then
        log("Memory Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    local memPos = memoryZone.getPosition()
    local memObjects = memoryZone.getObjects()
    local cardsInMemory = {}

    for _, obj in ipairs(memObjects) do
        if obj.tag == "Card" then
            table.insert(cardsInMemory, obj)
        end
    end

    local count = #cardsInMemory
    if count == 0 then return end

    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing  -- distance for 7 cards is 6 * 3.2 = 19.2
    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and -1 or 1
    local initial = (memPos.z > 0) and -9.5 or 9.5

    -- if count <= 7, use normal spacing; else shrink spacing so they all fit within the same total width
    local effectiveSpacing
    if count <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (count - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
        -- place them from left to right
        local offset = i - 1
        local finalPos = {
            x = memPos.x + initial + (offset * effectiveSpacing),
            y = memPos.y + 2,
            z = memPos.z
        }
        card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
    end
end

-- Helper: split any Deck in the zone into single cards, laid out in a line
function splitDecksInZone(zone)
    local pos = zone.getPosition()
    for _, obj in ipairs(zone.getObjects()) do
        if obj.tag == "Deck" then
            local contents = obj.getObjects() or {}
            local n        = #contents
            if n > 0 then
                local spacing = 0.6                       -- distance between cards
                local startX  = pos.x - spacing*(n-1)/2  -- center the line
                for i = 1, n do
                    local x = startX + (i-1)*spacing
                    obj.takeObject({
                        index    = 1,
                        position = { 4*x, pos.y + 2, pos.z+0.5 },
                        smooth   = false
                    })
                end
            end
            obj.destruct()
        end
    end
end

function reserveAndReorganizeMemory(player, value, index)
    -- 1) get the memory zone
    local memZone = getObjectFromGUID(playermemoryzones[player.color])
    if not memZone then
        log("Memory Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
        return
    end

    -- 2) split any decks into cards
    splitDecksInZone(memZone)

    -- 3) wait a moment for those new cards to appear
    Wait.time(function()
        local memPos = memZone.getPosition()

        -- 4) gather all cards now in memory
        local memoryCards = {}
        for _, o in ipairs(memZone.getObjects()) do
            if o.tag == "Card" then
                table.insert(memoryCards, o)
            end
        end
        local memCount = #memoryCards

        -- 5) find face-down cards in hand
        local handZone = getObjectFromGUID(playerhandzones[player.color])
        if not handZone then
            log("Hand Zone for " .. player.color .. " is nil.")
            return
        end
        local cardsToMove = {}
        for _, c in ipairs(handZone.getObjects() or {}) do
            if c.tag == "Card" and math.abs(c.getRotation().z) > 90 then
                table.insert(cardsToMove, c)
            end
        end
        local handCount = #cardsToMove

        -- 6) compute total and reorganize existing memory
        local totalCount = memCount + handCount
        reorganizeMemoryForTotal(memoryCards, memPos, totalCount)

        -- 7) if no new cards, we’re done
        if handCount == 0 then
            return
        end

        -- 8) otherwise wait a bit more, then move the new cards in place
        Wait.time(function()
            for i, card in ipairs(cardsToMove) do
                local offset   = memCount + (i - 1)
                local finalPos = getMemoryPosition(memPos, offset, totalCount)

                -- quick mid-air reposition
                local cp = card.getPosition()
                card.setPosition({
                    x = (cp.x + finalPos.x) / 2,
                    y = (cp.y + finalPos.y + 40) / 2,
                    z = (cp.z + finalPos.z) / 2,
                })
                card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
            end
        end, 0.5)

    end, 0.2)
end


-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Helper: Reorganize existing memory cards for a future total
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function reorganizeMemoryForTotal(cardsInMemory, memPos, futureTotal)
    if #cardsInMemory == 0 then return end

    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and 1 or -1

    table.sort(cardsInMemory, function(a, b)
      return a.getPosition().x*spacingSign < b.getPosition().x*spacingSign
    end)

    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local ySpacing = 0.05
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing


    local effectiveSpacing
    if futureTotal <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (futureTotal - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    -- same centered layout logic
    local startOffset = (futureTotal - 1) / 2
    local initial = memPos.x - startOffset * effectiveSpacing
    local yPos = memPos.y + 1
    local zPos = memPos.z

    for i, card in ipairs(cardsInMemory) do
        local offset = (i - 1)
        local finalPos = {
            x = initial + offset * effectiveSpacing,
            y = yPos + offset * ySpacing,
            z = zPos
        }
        card.setPositionSmooth(finalPos)
    end
end

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Helper: Calculate final position for a new card offset
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
function getMemoryPosition(memPos, offset, futureTotal)
    local baseCount = 7
    local baseSpacing = 3.2
    local maxWidth = (baseCount - 1) * baseSpacing
    local spacingSign = (memPos.z < 0) and 1 or -1

    local effectiveSpacing
    if futureTotal <= baseCount then
        effectiveSpacing = baseSpacing * spacingSign
    else
        effectiveSpacing = (maxWidth / (futureTotal - 1)) * spacingSign
    end

    local startOffset = (futureTotal - 1) / 2
    local initialX = memPos.x - startOffset * effectiveSpacing
    return {
        x = initialX + offset * effectiveSpacing,
        y = memPos.y + 2,
        z = memPos.z
    }
end


function recollectMemory(player, value, index)

  local memoryGuid = playermemoryzones[player.color]
  local memoryZone = getObjectFromGUID(memoryGuid)

  if memoryZone == nil then log("Memory Zone for player " .. player.color ..  " is nil.") return end


  if (memoryZone.getObjects()) != nil then
    for _,item in ipairs(memoryZone.getObjects()) do
      if item.tag == "Card" then
        item.deal(1,player.color)
      elseif item.tag == "Deck" then
        item.deal(99, player.color)
      end
    end
  end

end

-- Wait until the object is stable, optionally switch to newState, then call thenFn (if provided).
function waitToSwitchState(obj, newState, thenFn)
  if not obj or obj.isDestroyed() then return end

  local function stable()
    return obj and not obj.isDestroyed()
       and not obj.isSmoothMoving()
       and not obj.spawning
  end

  local function afterSettled()
    if thenFn then thenFn() end
  end

  local cur = obj.getStateId()
  if cur == newState then
    -- Already in desired state; just wait for stability
    Wait.condition(afterSettled, stable)
    return
  end

  if cur ~= -1 then
    -- Switch state, then wait for it to finish
    obj.setState(newState)
    Wait.condition(afterSettled, function()
      return stable() and obj.getStateId() == newState
    end)
  else
    -- No alt states; just wait for stability and continue
    Wait.condition(afterSettled, stable)
  end
end


function getLastStateIndex(obj)
  local states = obj.getStates()
  if states ~= nil then
    return #states+1
  end
  return 1
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, obj)
    if obj.tag == "Card" then
        if obj.getStateId() == getLastStateIndex(obj) then
          if zone.getName() == "Field" then
              if not obj.isDestroyed() then
                waitToSwitchState(obj, 1)
              end
          end
        end
    end
end

cachedCardJson = {}
allowPullFromIndex = true

local function getVisibleDeckEntry(deck)
  local list = deck.getObjects() or {}
  if #list == 0 then return nil end

  local pick, maxIndex = list[1], (list[1].index or -1)
  for _, e in ipairs(list) do
    local idx = e.index or -1
    if idx > maxIndex then
      pick, maxIndex = e, idx
    end
  end
  return pick or list[#list]
end

local function subjectCardName(obj)
  if not obj then return nil end
  if obj.tag == "Card" then
    return obj.getName()
  elseif obj.tag == "Deck" then
    local entry = getVisibleDeckEntry(obj)
    if entry then
      -- entry.nickname is usually the printed title; fall back to name
      return entry.nickname or entry.name
    end
  end
  return nil
end

local function subjectCardName(obj)
  local name = obj.getName() or ""
  local front, back = name:match("^%s*(.-)%s*/%s*(.-)%s*$")
  if not front then
    return name -- single-sided (or already a clean name)
  end
  -- In your table: z ~ 0 => face-down, z ~ 180 => face-up
  local isFaceDown = (math.abs(obj.getRotation().z) > 90)
  return isFaceDown and back or front
end

local function inscriptWhenStable(o)
  Wait.condition(function() inscriptCardRulesText(o) end,
    function() return o and not o.isDestroyed() and not o.isSmoothMoving() and not o.spawning end)
end

function inscriptCardRulesText(obj, slugoverride)
  local name = slugoverride or subjectCardName(obj)
  local slug = toReducedSlug(name)

  local ok, effect = pcall(function()
    return GA_EffectLibrary and GA_EffectLibrary.call("getRawEffect", { slug = slug })
  end)
  if ok and effect and obj and not obj.isDestroyed() then
    pcall(function() obj.setDescription(effect) end)
  end
end


function onObjectEnterZone(zone, obj)
    if (obj.tag == "Card" or obj.tag == "Deck") and not obj.hasTag("StatusToken") then
        if obj.tag == "Card" and zone.getName() == "MaterialDeckZone" and obj.getStateId() ~= 1 then
            waitToSwitchState(obj, 1)
        end
        if zone.getName() == "Field" then
          Encoder.call("APIencodeObject", { obj = obj })
        end
    end
end

function onObjectDrop(player_color, droppedObject)
    -- First: if they dropped a Quick Actions Panel itself, ignore
    if droppedObject.getName() == "Quick Actions Panel" then
        return
    end

    -- Bottoming cards or decks
    if droppedObject.tag == "Card" or droppedObject.tag == "Deck" then
        local name = droppedObject.getName()
        local rotation = droppedObject.getRotation()
        local fieldGUID = playerfields[player_color]
        if not fieldGUID then return end
        if name ~= "fluorish" and rotation.z<90 and objectIsInZone(droppedObject, getObjectFromGUID(fieldGUID)) then
          inscriptWhenStable(droppedObject)
        end
        for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
            if obj.getName() == "Quick Actions Panel" then
                if obj.getScale().x ~= 1.0 then
                    local quickBottomPosition = obj.positionToWorld({4,0,0})
                    local distance = (droppedObject.getPosition() - quickBottomPosition):magnitude()
                    if distance < 2.5 then
                        handleBottomDeck(droppedObject, player_color)
                        return
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Auto-rename decks dropped onto playmat
    if droppedObject.tag == "Deck" then
        local playmat = getObjectFromGUID(playmats[player_color])
        if playmat then



            local minBound, maxBound = getBoundsOfDeckZone(player_color, "main")
            local pos = droppedObject.getPosition()
            if isPointInBounds(pos, minBound, maxBound) then

                local name = droppedObject.getName()
                if not name:lower():find("main") then
                    droppedObject.setName(name .. "main")
                end
            end

        end
    end
end

function handleBottomDeckRemote(packet)
  handleBottomDeck(packet[1], packet[2])
end

function handleBottomDeck(droppedObject, player_color)
    local deck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
    local deckPos = nil
    if deck then
        deckPos = deck.getPosition()
    else
        broadcastToColor("Cannot find your main deck - making a new one!", player_color, {0.8,0.8,0.8})
        deckPos = findPlayerZoneByName(player_color, "main")
    end


    local liftedPos = Vector(deckPos.x, 4, deckPos.z)  -- Lift even higher

    if deck then
      -- Step 1: Lock and Lift the deck
      deck.setLock(true)
      deck.setPositionSmooth(liftedPos, false, true)
    end

    Wait.time(function()
        -- Flip face-up cards face-down
        if not droppedObject.is_face_down then
            droppedObject.flip()
        end
        -- Step 2: Move dropped object under deck
        droppedObject.setPositionSmooth(Vector(deckPos.x, 2, deckPos.z), false, true)


        Wait.time(function()
            if deck then
              -- Step 3: Move deck back down
              deck.setLock(false)
              deck.setPositionSmooth(Vector(deckPos.x, 2, deckPos.z), false, true)
            end

            -- Step 4: After short delay, unlock the deck
            Wait.time(function()


                -- Step 5: Correct the name afterward
                Wait.time(function()
                    local newDeck = findPlayerDeckByName(player_color, "main")
                    if newDeck then
                        local name = newDeck.getName()
                        if not name:lower():find("main") then
                            newDeck.setName(name .. "main")
                        end
                    end
                end, 0.5)

            end, 0.6)

        end, 0.5)

    end, 0.5)

end

function linkToDeckBottom(player, value, index)
  broadcastToColor("Drop cards here to send them to the bottom of your main deck!", player.color, {255,0,0})
end

local function split_on_slash(name)
  local left, right = name:match("^(.-)%s*/%s*(.+)$")
  return left and trimSpaces(left) or trimSpaces(name), right and trimSpaces(right) or nil
end

function onPlayerAction(player, action, targets)
  if action ~= Player.Action.FlipOver then return end

  local fieldGUID = playerfields[player.color]
  if not fieldGUID then return end

  for _, obj in ipairs(targets) do
    if obj and obj.tag == "Card" then
      -- Is this card in the player's Field zone?
      local inField = false
      local zones = obj.getZones() or {}
      for _, z in ipairs(zones) do
        if z.guid == fieldGUID then inField = true; break end
      end
      if inField then
        -- Wait for the flip physics to settle
        Wait.condition(function()
          if not obj or obj.isDestroyed() then return end

          local lastIdx = getLastStateIndex(obj)

          -- On the first flip for double-faced cards: move into the final (multi-face) state
          if lastIdx and lastIdx > 1 and obj.getStateId() ~= lastIdx then
            waitToSwitchState(obj, lastIdx, function()
              -- tiny delay helps ensure name/state/description are all “live”
              Wait.time(function()
                if obj and not obj.isDestroyed() then
                  inscriptCardRulesText(obj)
                end
              end, 0.05)
            end)
          else
            -- Already in the final state (or single-face card): just inscript after flip settles
            Wait.time(function()
              if obj and not obj.isDestroyed() then
                inscriptCardRulesText(obj)
              end
            end, 0.05)
          end
        end, function()
          return obj and not obj.isDestroyed()
             and not obj.isSmoothMoving()
             and not obj.spawning
        end)
      end
    end
  end
end

  -- ---------- helpers ----------
  local function urlencode(s)
    return (tostring(s):gsub("\n", "\r\n"):gsub("([^%w _%-%.~])", function(c)
      return string.format("%%%02X", string.byte(c))
    end):gsub(" ", "%%20"))
  end

  local function clean(s)
    s = (s or ""):lower()
    s = s:gsub("[%p]", " "):gsub("%s+", " "):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
    return s
  end

  -- rank: 1 exact, 2 startswith, 3 word-startswith, 4 contains, else 9
  local function rankName(name, q)
    local n, qn = clean(name), clean(q)
    if n == qn then return 1 end
    if n:sub(1, #qn) == qn then return 2 end
    for w in n:gmatch("%S+") do
      if w:sub(1, #qn) == qn then return 3 end
    end
    if n:find(qn, 1, true) then return 4 end
    return 9
  end

-- reduced tools slug from TITLE (left side of '/', slugified)
local function reducedSlugFromTitle(name)
  name = name or ""
  -- take only the left side before a slash (if any)
  local left = name:match("^(.-)%s*/%s*.+$") or name
  left = left:lower()

  -- handle possessives like "revenant’s" / "revenant's" → "revenants"
  left = left:gsub("['’]s", "s")

  -- drop leftover apostrophes/backticks (straight or curly)
  left = left:gsub("[‘’´`']", "")

  -- spaces → hyphen
  left = left:gsub("%s+", "-")

  -- turn any remaining non-alnum, non-hyphen chars into hyphen
  left = left:gsub("[^%w%-]+", "-")

  -- collapse multiple hyphens and trim edges
  left = left:gsub("%-+", "-"):gsub("^%-+", ""):gsub("%-+$", "")

  return left
end

  local function spawnFromToolsSlug(slug, player)
    local url = "https://grand-archive.tools/card/" .. slug .. "/json"
    WebRequest.get(url, function(res)
      if res.is_error or (res.response_code or res.status_code) ~= 200 then
        Player[player.color].broadcast("No card JSON for slug: "..slug, {1,0.3,0.3})
        return
      end
      local blob = '{"cards":{"spawn":[' .. res.text .. ']}}'
      local ok, cardData = pcall(JSON.decode, blob)
      local locationOverride = player.GetPointerPosition()
      locationOverride.y = locationOverride.y+1
      if ok and cardData then
        Global.call("spawnDeckRemote", { json = cardData, player = player, locationOverride = locationOverride })
      end
    end)
  end

  -- ---------- chat hook ----------
  function onChat(message, player)
    local m = message or ""
    if m:lower():sub(1,6) ~= "index " then return end
    local query = m:sub(7):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")
    if query == "" then
      Player[player.color].broadcast("Usage: index <card name>", {1,0.9,0})
      return false
    end

    print (urlencode(query))

    local searchURL = "https://api.gatcg.com/cards/search?name=" .. urlencode(query)
    WebRequest.get(searchURL, function(res)
      if res.is_error or (res.response_code or res.status_code) ~= 200 then
        Player[player.color].broadcast("Index search failed.", {1,0.3,0.3})
        return
      end
      local ok, js = pcall(JSON.decode, res.text)
      if not ok or not js or not js.data or #js.data == 0 then
        Player[player.color].broadcast("No results for: " .. query, {1,0.9,0})
        return
      end

      table.sort(js.data, function(a, b)
        local ra = rankName(a.name or "", query)
        local rb = rankName(b.name or "", query)
        if ra ~= rb then return ra < rb end
        return (a.name or "") < (b.name or "")
      end)

      local best = js.data[1]
      local slug = reducedSlugFromTitle(best.name or "")
      print(best.name)
      if not slug or slug == "" then
        Player[player.color].broadcast("Could not derive slug from title.", {1,0.3,0.3})
        return
      end

      Player[player.color].broadcast("Spawning: " .. (best.name or slug), {0.6,1,0.6})
      spawnFromToolsSlug(slug, player)
    end)

    return false -- suppress the chat echo of the command
  end



function onPlayerChangeColor(player_color)
    Wait.time(function()
        resetCamera(player_color)
    end, 0.5) -- Delay allows default camera animation to complete
end

hotkey_table =
{
  [1] = banishOneMemoryCard,
  [2] = reserveAndReorganizeMemory,
  [3] = wakeUpEverythingOnPlaymat,
  [4] = revealRandomMemoryCard,
  [5] = glimpseQuickAction,
  [6] = millTopCard,
  [9] = resetCamera,
  [10] = recollectMemory,
}


function onScriptingButtonUp(index, player_color)
    local player = Player[player_color]
    functionToDo = hotkey_table[index]
    if(functionToDo) then
        functionToDo(player, index, index)
    end
end

ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
status_token_modes = {
    ["Distant"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969320/08BE4A7BC815629A2294C337269304080D94DAAD/",
    ["Imbued"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969389/F806E20BA9BEB8E94D869C7B8C0F004C32594084/",
    ["Fostered"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969343/A2105FB70AA2AE099789C824E4DC13BEE21EC14C/",
    ["Fracturized"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969364/818FB12F374D724422073CBB864BBAAC954B42C7/",
    ["Suppressed"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969442/560B4B92B582727E0A0064A84C23A123F4CE137F/",
   ["Stealth"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969434/5DD5FDC75748DCF281A0F590D6EC3862D96EBD49/",
    ["Ephemeral"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/15824654990132080817/CF963363B41203D879F35B356F880A08CE75CE76/",
 ["Used Up"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17975767217581539314/D69225E9179BCC849AD50BE162287EEB0A777DCD/",
 ["Omen"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/14862974098382534191/8DCE9B71D6638B957B6ED95784B970D7FE24DE5B/",
    ["Taunt"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969452/5D20E1515D5DAB548A6C6C8F31BE1947419B5984/",
      ["Frenzy"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/9987268309179907279/526D447EC9740A20613A2FD161576EF814D6BE41/",
 ["Distortion"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/10101640314176795470/7C85EA7546724E156A54AD9C4F93ED2E4BD1D0CF/",
 ["Dontwake"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/10182263191515917231/E0265689FBBE761D0EF3C3CB5242452A309310D3/",
 ["Immortality"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969400/72C870072D50344D76D326AF2EBCABB59D62DA2A/",
      ["True Sight"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969461/EAAC11EC772919F8AC026EA85B26B184A53A2D5C/",
    ["Spellshroud"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969411/E877AF2C163AA2E297920E5453189F66C511838F/",
    ["Brewed"] = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1797820640969279/9B00C1EE1A8A172D5D86E74CF3F3758B33FB5710/",
}

status_token_modes_by_number = {}
status_token_numbers_by_mode = {}
num_token_types = 0

current_mode = "Fracturized"
current_mode_number = 4

function findKeyByValue(table, value)
    for key, val in pairs(table) do
        if val == value then
            return key
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function onLoad()
    status_token_modes_by_number = {}
    status_token_numbers_by_mode = {}
    num_token_types = 0
    for mode, _ in pairs(status_token_modes) do
        self.addContextMenuItem("Switch to " .. mode, function() setTokenImage(mode) end)
        num_token_types = num_token_types + 1
        status_token_modes_by_number[num_token_types] = mode
        status_token_numbers_by_mode[mode] = num_token_types
    end
    self.addTag("StatusToken")
end

function setTokenImage(mode)
    local custom = self.getCustomObject()
    custom.face = status_token_modes[mode]
    self.setCustomObject(custom)
    self.setName(mode .. " Token")
    current_mode = mode
    current_mode_number = status_token_numbers_by_mode[mode]
end

function onNumberTyped(player_color, number)
  if (number==0) then
      number = (current_mode_number % num_token_types)+1
  end
  setTokenImage(status_token_modes_by_number[number])
  return true
end

function getCorrectRotation()
  local sideOfTable = self.getPosition().z > 0
  return sideOfTable and {0,0,0} or {0,180,0}
end

function onDrop(color)
    self.setRotationSmooth(getCorrectRotation(), false, true)
end

function onRotate(spin, flip, player_color, old_spin, old_flip)
  local tokenPos = self.getPosition()

  local closest, bestDist = nil, 2.0  -- only within 1 unit
  for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
    if obj.tag == "Card" and not obj.hasTag("StatusToken") then
      local d = (obj.getPosition() - tokenPos):magnitude()
      if d < bestDist then
        closest, bestDist = obj, d
      end
    end
  end

  if closest then
    local r = closest.getRotation()
    local sideOfTable = self.getPosition().z > 0
    if sideOfTable then
      r.y = (r.y + spin) % 360
    else
      r.y = (r.y - spin) % 360
    end
    closest.setRotationSmooth(r, false, true)
  end

  Wait.time(function()
    self.setRotationSmooth(getCorrectRotation(), false, true)
  end, 0.1)
end
