end

ObjectStates.Name: PiecePack_Crowns
ObjectStates.Description:
This tool makes sure all players (present and future) are promoted so they have "host" powers: delete/spawn/copy/paste/etc.

The tool also takes care that deliberately demoted players are never automatically promoted again (such as if they drop & rejoin or if time is rewound).

You'll probably want to hide this underneath the table, disable tooltip, and disable interactivity (see script).
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
--::[[ Auto Player Promoter ]]::--
-- Version 1.0
-- By Kevin O'Mara (Quickle)
-- https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561197997376704

--[[
This script runs in the background and makes sure all players are promoted so
they have "host" powers (delete/spawn/copy/paste/etc.) For more info on host:
http://berserk-games.com/knowledgebase/player-roles/

Additionally, if a player gets "demoted", the script takes care they are never
automatically promoted again (i.e. when the player drops and re-joins the match,
the game is saved and loaded in the future, or time is rewound/fast forwarded).

Players are promoted at the following times:
* All players are promoted each time the game first loads (including Undo/Redo).
* New players are promoted upon joining the match.

Whether a player is "demoted" is recorded at the following times:
* All players are recorded when the game saves (including auto saves).
* Individual players are recorded when they leave the match.

Undo / Redo
* Undo - A demoted player may become promoted again if time rewinds to a point
  when they were previously promoted.
* Redo - A player will never become demoted when time fast forwards, even if
  they had previously been demoted at that autosave.
--]]



--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--[[ CONFIGURATION  ]]----------------------------------------------------------
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--[[
You can modify the script's behavior by changing these variables:
--]]

-- When true, this object is interactable by Players.
-- You may wish to lock this object and hide it somewhere. To do so, simply:
--  1. Set this value to 'true' & save the script.
--  2. Move the object somewhere & save the game.
--  3. Set this value back to 'false' & save the script.
local objectIsInteractable = true

-- When true, a chat message announces each time a player is automatically
-- promoted or would have been promoted (but wasn't because they are "demoted").
-- Lets players know they are being promoted by a script rather than the host.
local chatEnabled = false

-- When true, debug information is written the log window (host only).
local loggingEnabled = false


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
--[[ SCRIPT CODE  ]]------------------------------------------------------------
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

--[[ Utility Methods ]]---------------------------------------------------------

local function _log(element, label)
    -- Log a message with the prefix "AutoPlayerPromoter: ".
    -- Wrapper for `log()`: https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/base/#log
    if loggingEnabled then
        log(element, "AutoPlayerPromoter: " .. tostring(label))
    end
end

local function _printToAll(message)
    -- Print a message to chat, but only if `chatEnabled` is `true`.
    -- Wrapper for `print()`: https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/base/#print
    if chatEnabled then
        printToAll(message)
    end
end

local function _playerAsTable(player)
    -- Return a <Player> object (https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/player/) as a
    -- simple key-value table, which can be expanded by the built-in logging
    -- method: https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/base/#log
    return {
        steam_name  = player.steam_name,
        steam_id    = player.steam_id,
        promoted    = player.promoted,
        host        = player.host,
        admin       = player.admin,
        color       = player.color,
        team        = player.team,
        seated      = player.seated,
        blindfolded = player.blindfolded,
        lift_height = player.lift_height,
    }
end
--//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////



--[[ Player Promotion Tracker ]]------------------------------------------------
--[[
Keeps track of which players are demoted and offers a method to promote players.
--]]

-- Steam IDs of Players who have had their promotion revoked.
-- @type: Set<string>
local _demotedPlayerSteamIds = {}

function isOnDemotedPlayerList(player)
    -- @param player <Player> (https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/player/)
    return _demotedPlayerSteamIds[player.steam_id] ~= nil
end

function isPromoted(player)
    -- @param player <Player> (https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/player/)
    return player.promoted or player.host
end

function tryPromotePlayer(player)
    -- @param player <Player> (https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/player/)
    if isOnDemotedPlayerList(player) then
        _log(_playerAsTable(player), "Will not promote player because they are on the Demoted Player List: ")
        _printToAll("AutoPlayerPromoter: Not promoting player " .. tostring(player.steam_name) .. ", because they were demoted by host.")
    elseif isPromoted(player) then
        _log(_playerAsTable(player), "Will not promote player because they are already promoted or host: ")
    else
        _log(_playerAsTable(player), "Promoting player: ")
        _printToAll("AutoPlayerPromoter: Promoting " .. tostring(player.steam_name))
        player.promote()
    end
end

function savePlayerPromotionState(player)
    -- @param player <Player> (https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/player/)
    if isPromoted(player) then
        _log(_playerAsTable(player), "Saving player's promotion status. Player is <promoted>: ")
        _demotedPlayerSteamIds[player.steam_id] = nil
    else
        _log(_playerAsTable(player), "Saving player's promotion status. Player is <demoted>: ")
        _demotedPlayerSteamIds[player.steam_id] = {}
    end
end
--//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////



--[[ Event Hooks ]]-------------------------------------------------------------
--[[
Makes sure players are getting promoted and recorded at the right times by
responding to events.
--]]

function onLoad(saveData)
    self.interactable = objectIsInteractable

    _log(saveData, "Loading from script state: ")
    if saveData == "" then
        _demotedPlayerSteamIds = {}
    else
        _demotedPlayerSteamIds = JSON.decode(saveData)
    end

    local players = Player.getPlayers()
    for _, player in ipairs(players) do
        tryPromotePlayer(player)
    end
end

function onPlayerConnect(player)
    -- @param player <Player> (https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/player/)
    tryPromotePlayer(player)
end

function onPlayerDisconnect(player)
    -- @param player <Player> (https://api.tabletopsimulator.com/player/)
    savePlayerPromotionState(player)
end

function onSave()
    local players = Player.getPlayers()
    for _, player in ipairs(players) do
        savePlayerPromotionState(player)
    end

    saveData = JSON.encode(_demotedPlayerSteamIds)
    _log(saveData, "Saving script state: ")
    return saveData
end
--//////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

--Suppressed
--By Tipsy Hobbit, adapted for GA by Amphi
pID = "GA_Suppress"
version = '1.12'

function onload()
  self.createButton({
  label="+", click_function='registerModule', function_owner=self,
  position={0,0.2,-0.5}, height=100, width=100, font_size=100,
  rotation={0,0,0},tooltip="Version: "..version
  })
  Wait.condition(registerModule,function() return Global.getVar('Encoder') ~= nil and true or false end)
end
function registerModule()
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
		properties = {
		propID = pID,
		name = "Suppressed",
		values = {'ga_suppressed'},
		funcOwner = self,
		tags='tool,face_prop',
		activateFunc ='suppress'
		}
		enc.call("APIregisterProperty",properties)
    value = {
    valueID = 'ga_suppressed',
    validType = 'boolean',
    desc = 'GA: Is the card suppressed?.',
    default = false
    }
    enc.call("APIregisterValue",value)
  end
end
function createButtons(t)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
    flip = enc.call("APIgetFlip",{obj=t.obj})
    scaler = {x=0.5,y=0.5,z=0.5}--t.obj.getScale()
    temp = "SUPPRESSED\r\nclick to return"
    barSize,fsize,offset_x,offset_y = enc.call('APIformatButton',{str=temp,font_size=400,max_len=90,xJust=0,yJust=0})
    t.obj.createButton({
    label=temp, click_function='unsuppress', function_owner=self,
    position={(0+offset_x)*flip*scaler.x,0.63*flip*scaler.z,(0+offset_y)*scaler.y}, height=800, width=1300, font_size=200,color={0,0,0,1},font_color={0.3,0.8,0.3,1},
    rotation={0,90,90-90*flip,tooltip="This object is Suppressed."}
    })
  end
end
function suppress(obj,ply)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
    enc.call("APItoggleProperty",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
    data = enc.call("APIobjGetPropData",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
		if data.ga_suppressed ~= true then
			data.ga_suppressed = true
    else
      data.ga_suppressed = false
    end
    enc.call("APIobjSetPropData",{obj=obj,propID=pID,data=data})
    enc.call("APIrebuildButtons",{obj=obj})
  end
  local ga_menu = Global.getVar('GA_Menu')
  ga_menu.call("shutMenu", {obj=obj})  
end
function unsuppress(obj,ply)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil and enc.call("APIobjectExists",{obj=obj}) then
    flip = enc.call("APIgetFlip",{obj=obj})

		data = enc.call("APIobjGetPropData",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
		if data.ga_suppressed == true then
			data.ga_suppressed = false
			enc.call("APIobjSetPropData",{obj=obj,propID=pID,data=data})
      enc.call("APIobjDisableProp",{obj=obj,propID=pID})
		end
		if type(ply) == "string" then
			local selection =Player[ply].getSelectedObjects()
			if selection ~= nil then
				for k,v in pairs(selection) do
					if v ~= tar and enc.call("APIobjectExists",{obj=v}) == true then
						unsuppress(v,0)
					end
				end
			end
		end
    enc.call("APIrebuildButtons",{obj=obj})
  end
end
function updateModule(wr)
  enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
  if enc ~= nil then
    wr = wr.text
    wrv = string.match(wr,"version = '(.-)'")
    if wrv == 'DEPRECIATED' then
      enc.call("APIremoveProperty",{propID=pID})
      self.destruct()
    end
    local ver = enc.call("APIversionComp",{wv=wrv,cv=version})
    if ''..ver ~= ''..version then
      broadcastToAll("An update has been found for "..pID..". Reloading Module.")
      self.script_code = wr
      self.reload()
    else
      broadcastToAll("No update found for "..pID..". Carry on.")
    end
  end
end

    print("aaa")
  end

cachedReferences = {}

local function getVisibleDeckEntry(deck)
  local list = deck.getObjects() or {}
  if #list == 0 then return nil end

  local pick, maxIndex = list[1], (list[1].index or -1)
  for _, e in ipairs(list) do
    local idx = e.index or -1
    if idx > maxIndex then
      pick, maxIndex = e, idx
    end
  end
  return pick or list[#list]
end


local function subjectCardName(obj)
  if not obj then return nil end
  if obj.tag == "Card" then
    return obj.getName()
  elseif obj.tag == "Deck" then
    local entry = getVisibleDeckEntry(obj)
    if entry then
      -- entry.nickname is usually the printed title; fall back to name
      return entry.nickname or entry.name
    end
  end
  return nil
end

local temp_gather_hack_json = {
  { name = "Blightroot",  slug = "blightroot"  },
  { name = "Manaroot",    slug = "manaroot"    },
  { name = "Silvershine", slug = "silvershine" },
  { name = "Fraysia",     slug = "fraysia"     },
  { name = "Razorvine",   slug = "razorvine"   },
  { name = "Springleaf",  slug = "springleaf"  },
}

function summonRandomReference(obj, ply)
  summonReferences(obj,ply,true)
end

function summonReferences(obj, ply, is_random)
    local enc = Global.getVar('Encoder')
    local name = subjectCardName(obj)
    if is_random then
      print ("Spawning Random Reference for " .. name)
    else
      print ("Spawning References for " .. name)
    end
    local slug = name:lower():gsub(" ", "-"):gsub("'", ""):gsub(",", "")

    if cachedReferences[slug] != nil then
      summonCachedReferences(obj, ply, slug, is_random)
    elseif enc ~= nil then
        if is_random then
          -- temp hack because index doesn't have all the gather references
          cachedReferences[slug] = temp_gather_hack_json
          summonCachedReferences(obj, ply, slug, is_random)
        else
          local url = "https://api.gatcg.com/cards/" .. slug
          WebRequest.get(url, function(response)
              if response.is_error then
                log(response.error)
              else
                  local jsonData = JSON.decode(response.text)
                  cachedReferences[slug] = jsonData.references
                  summonCachedReferences(obj, ply, slug, is_random)
              end
          end)
        end
    else
        print("Encoder not found.")
    end
    if not is_random then
      local ga_menu = Global.getVar('GA_Menu')
      ga_menu.call("shutMenu", {obj=obj})
    end
end

function tablelength(T)
  local count = 0
  for _ in pairs(T) do count = count + 1 end
  return count
end

function summonCachedReferences(obj, ply, slug, is_random)
  if cachedReferences[slug] then
      reference_count = tablelength(cachedReferences[slug])
      random_roll = math.random(reference_count)
      index=1
      for _, reference in ipairs(cachedReferences[slug]) do
        if is_random == false or index == random_roll then
          summonOneCard(reference.slug, Player[ply], obj)
        end
        index = index + 1
      end
  else
      print("No references found.")
  end
end

cachedCards = {}

function summonOneCard(slug, player, obj)
    local url = "https://grand-archive.tools/card/" .. slug .. "/json"

    if cachedCards[slug] ~= nil then
      summonOneCachedCard(slug, player, obj)
      return
    end

    WebRequest.get(url, function(request)
        if request.is_error then
            log(request.error)
        elseif request.response_code == 204 then
            log("No card was found for URL: " .. url)
        elseif request.response_code == 200 then
            local jsonBlob = '{"cards": {"spawn": [' ..  request.text .. ']}}'

            local cardData = JSON.decode(jsonBlob)

            if not cardData or not cardData.cards then
                log("Invalid JSON.")
            end
            cachedCards[slug] = cardData

            summonOneCachedCard(slug, player, obj)

        else
            log("Unknown issue retrieving card data from: " .. jsonUrl)
        end
    end)
end

function summonOneCachedCard(slug, player, obj)
  local spawner_pos = obj.getPosition()
  local zsign = spawner_pos.z / math.abs( spawner_pos.z )
  local deckObjectData = Global.call("spawnDeckRemote", {
      json  = cachedCards[slug],
      player = player,
      locationOverride = {spawner_pos.x+1,spawner_pos.y+1,spawner_pos.z-(zsign*4)},
      rotationOverride = obj.getRotation()
  })
end
